result:
Done — the spec is fully implemented and the project builds cleanly with zero warnings on the first build cycle.

I added the two missing static methods to `TextUtils.cs`, matching the existing style:

- **`Truncate(s, maxLen)`** — returns `s` unchanged when it already fits; otherwise appends `"..."` after the first `maxLen - 3` characters when `maxLen > 3` (result exactly `maxLen` chars), or just takes the first `maxLen` characters when the ellipsis doesn't fit (`maxLen <= 3`, including `0` → empty string).
- **`WordCount(s)`** — uses `s.Split(null, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)`, which splits on all whitespace (spaces, tabs, CR, LF) and drops empty entries, so leading/trailing/repeated whitespace never affects the count and empty or whitespace-only strings return `0`.

`Slugify` is untouched, both methods are pure string computations, and no test or project files were modified.
